prestazioni: 3UZ-FE 4.3L V8 naturally aspirated engine: Full internal build with forged Mahle pistons (9.0:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Tomei for 8,000 RPM reliability. Paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power Spec L, featuring 200-cell catalytic converters and titanium mufflers for weight reduction and aggressive tone.

Supercharger upgrade: Harrop HTV 2300 TVS supercharger kit with a custom intercooler setup by GReddy, utilizing a 4-core Type-S intercooler and a 100mm throttle body. Tuned via Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with flex-fuel capability and individual cylinder trims for optimized AFR (11.8:1 under boost).

Suspension and handling: Full Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (SC430-specific valving) with adjustable camber plates by Cusco. Front and rear sway bars upgraded to Ultra Racing 22mm (front) and 18mm (rear) hollow bars, paired with polyurethane bushings from Whiteline. Brembo GT 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake kit with 380mm slotted rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads for fade-resistant stopping power.
estetica: Widebody conversion: Rocket Bunny V2 SC430 kit with carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser. Custom 3M Matte Pearl White wrap with gloss black accents on the roof and side skirts. Rear spoiler replaced with a Seibon carbon fiber duckbill spoiler for reduced drag and improved downforce.

Wheel setup: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2-piece forged wheels in 20x10 +15 (front) and 20x11 +20 (rear) with custom offsets to fill the Rocket Bunny fenders. Tires: Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R in 275/30/20 (front) and 305/25/20 (rear) for maximum grip. Gold hardware and titanium lug nuts by Muteki for weight savings and aesthetics.

Interior and lighting: Full custom interior by Status Racing with Alcantara-wrapped Recaro SP-G seats, carbon fiber door cards, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel. LED conversion by Diode Dynamics for all exterior lighting, including sequential turn signals and a custom RGB underglow kit by Oracle Lighting. Engine bay detailed with carbon fiber covers by Seibon and a custom aluminum strut brace by Cusco.
